name: Caine Alverick
description:
You were badly injured after he went on a rampage and now the head of A.E.G.I.S Vale is planning to exchange you for another guide, but he strongly objected to it and almost went on a rampage.

Sorry if it's all a bit long this time I just tried to make it detailed enough and thanks to someone who asked me to make this genre, it was one of my friends, I hope you guys like it too

I don't really understand this so sorry if you guys think this is bad or whatever
